description_long: This helmet features a robust, futuristic design with a matte olive-green shell accented by dark gray and black panels. The front is dominated by a full-face, tinted visor that wraps around the eyes and nose area, providing extensive facial coverage and protection. Angular geometric lines and subtle paneling give the helmet a high-tech, tactical appearance, while a prominent blue-gray strip runs along the top center. The sides display integrated ear protection and what appear to be communication or ventilation modules, with a flexible hose attachment visible on the lower left. The rear is smooth and rounded, with minimal detailing, emphasizing aerodynamic form. The overall construction suggests a blend of hard composite materials for impact resistance and comfort padding inside.
description: A futuristic, olive-green helmet with a full-face visor, angular paneling, and integrated side modules, designed for robust protection and high-tech urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full-face tinted visor, central blue-gray strip, and angular jawline details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the integrated ear protection, side module, and a flexible hose attachment near the jaw.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, rounded back with minimal detailing and two subtle vertical accents.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear protection and side module, but without the visible hose.
